meaning: n.毛拉(巴基斯坦、印度等国对波斯语和阿拉伯语学者的称号)
examples: On Wednesday it said that senior Taliban leader Maulana Fazlullah had been wounded in the fighting.
So far, probably the best work of Tafseer in English is by Maulana Abul A'la Maududi.
